name: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
overview: Instead of spending her golden years lying down, the indomitable Hetty Wainthropp found her calling late in life. Combining common sense, her husband, and her pocketbook, this senior sleuth takes on all the cases the police deem too minor.

trailers.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates (1996 ITV & BBC1 TV Series) Trailer II
